title: Apache HTTP Server mod_proxy_uwsgi buffer overflow
description: A buffer overflow in mod_proxy_uwsgi allows remote attackers to cause denial of service or potentially execute code.

title: Apache HTTP Server privilege escalation
description: A privilege escalation vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server allows less privileged users to execute arbitrary code.

title: nginx DNS resolver off-by-one heap write
description: A vulnerability in nginx DNS resolver allows remote attackers to cause heap memory corruption.

title: OpenSSH observable discrepancy in authentication
description: An observable discrepancy in SSH authentication could allow user enumeration.

title: MySQL Server: DML unspecified vulnerability
description: Vulnerability in the MySQL Server product allows high privileged attacker to cause denial of service.

title: PostgreSQL information disclosure
description: A vulnerability in PostgreSQL could allow an unprivileged user to read arbitrary files.

title: Apache Tomcat Information Disclosure
description: A vulnerability in Tomcat's JNDI Realm allows information disclosure via the directory listing.
remediation: Upgrade to Apache Tomcat 9.0.45 or later.

title: IIS HTTP Protocol Stack Remote Code Execution
description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the HTTP protocol stack in IIS.

title: PHP FPM local privilege escalation
description: A vulnerability in PHP-FPM could allow a local attacker to escalate privileges.

title: OpenSSL NULL pointer dereference
description: A NULL pointer dereference in OpenSSL could cause a denial of service.

title: Apache HTTP Server weak Digest auth nonce
description: Weak Digest auth nonce generation could allow replay attacks.

title: nginx HTTP request smuggling
description: An HTTP request smuggling vulnerability in nginx could allow cache poisoning.

title: Tomcat remote code execution via session persistence
description: A remote code execution vulnerability when using persistent session storage.

title: OpenSSH user enumeration
description: OpenSSH through 7.9 allows user enumeration due to different responses.

title: MySQL Server: Optimizer unspecified vulnerability
description: Vulnerability in MySQL Server could allow high privileged attacker to cause hang or crash.

title: PostgreSQL SQL injection in pg_dump
description: A SQL injection vulnerability in pg_dump could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary SQL.

title: PHP special character parsing in fopen()
description: A vulnerability in fopen() could lead to information disclosure.

title: Apache mod_proxy_ftp SSRF
description: A server-side request forgery vulnerability in mod_proxy_ftp.

title: IIS Server Memory Corruption
description: A memory corruption vulnerability in IIS could lead to denial of service.

title: Tomcat incomplete cleanup of concurrent resources
description: Improper resource cleanup could lead to information disclosure.

title: nginx DNS resolver memory exhaustion
description: A memory exhaustion vulnerability in the DNS resolver of nginx.

title: OpenSSL infinite loop in BN_mod_sqrt()
description: A crafted certificate can cause infinite loop and denial of service.

title: PHP use-after-free in FPM
description: A use-after-free vulnerability in PHP-FPM could lead to remote code execution.

title: Apache path traversal and remote code execution
description: A path traversal flaw in Apache 2.4.49/2.4.50 allows RCE.

title: Apache path traversal and file disclosure
description: A path traversal vulnerability in Apache 2.4.49 allows remote attackers to read arbitrary files.

title: nginx ALPACA protocol confusion
description: A vulnerability in nginx could allow man-in-the-middle attackers to redirect traffic.

title: OpenSSH privilege escalation via sshd
description: A vulnerability in sshd allows privilege escalation on some systems.

title: MySQL InnoDB vulnerability
description: Vulnerability in InnoDB could allow a high privileged attacker to cause denial of service.

title: PostgreSQL memory disclosure
description: A vulnerability could allow an attacker to read arbitrary memory.

title: IIS HTTP request smuggling
description: A request smuggling vulnerability in IIS could lead to cache poisoning.
